# EVLightShows.com
> EVLightShows.com is a web app that generates custom Tesla light shows from any song. Users upload an MP3 or WAV file and the generator creates Tesla-compatible FSEQ light show files using Tesla's official 200-channel format, validated against Tesla's official validator. Works with Model 3 (including Highland), Model Y (including Juniper), Cybertruck, Model S, and Model X. Free 20-second preview snippet available before purchase.
## How it works
1. Upload any MP3 or WAV song
2. The generator analyzes the audio and creates multiple light show renditions
3. Download Tesla-ready files (.fseq + matching audio)
4. Put the files in a folder named "LightShow" on a USB drive (FAT32 or exFAT)
5. Plug the USB into your Tesla and play via Toybox > Light Show
## Pricing
- 1 download: $4.99 (one full-length light show)
- 3 downloads: $9.99 ($3.33 per show)
- 10 downloads: $14.99 ($1.50 per show)
- Free 20-second snippet preview available with an account
- One-time purchases via Stripe. No subscription.
## Key pages
- [Light Show Generator](https://evlightshows.com/tesla-light-show-generator): Upload a song and generate a custom show
- [How to Add a Custom Light Show to Tesla](https://evlightshows.com/how-to-add-custom-light-show-to-tesla): Step-by-step USB setup guide
- [Troubleshooting](https://evlightshows.com/tesla-light-show-not-working): Fixes for shows not appearing or playing
- [Best Tesla Light Show Software](https://evlightshows.com/best-tesla-light-show-software): Comparison of creation methods
- [FAQ](https://evlightshows.com/tesla-light-show-faq): Common questions
- [Supported Models](https://evlightshows.com/tesla-light-show-models): Model 3, Model Y, Cybertruck, Model S, Model X
## Notes
- EVLightShows.com is an independent service, not affiliated with Tesla, Inc.
- Users must own or have rights to uploaded music.
